rationale: The corporate name being reserved. Uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name) because this is a domestic Maine reservation, mirroring CORP_ASUM-5 (the analogous business-corp reservation form).

Name of the person or entity applying for the reservation. Distinct from entity.name and from filing.signer.* because the applicant is the party holding the reservation (not yet a filer of an entity that exists).
Single-widget combined address of the applicant (no street/city/state/zip split on this template).
Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-21). The signature line itself is wet-ink; only the printed-name-and-capacity blank is an AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing (typically the same value as entity.name on a single-form reservation).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (rarely used on a name reservation since the form stands alone).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($5 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Persistent annual-report reminder email (unusual on a reservation since no annual-report obligation exists yet, but the cover-letter widget is present).
